name: USS Adams (DM 27)
events: 1 Nov 1944 USS Adams departed from Boston to conduct her shakedown at Bermuda.
29 Nov 1944 With her shakedown completed USS Adams departed from Bermuda bound for Norfolk.
3 Dec 1944 USS Adams arrived at Norfolk.
11 Dec 1944 USS Adams departed from Norfolk bound for New York.
15 Dec 1944 USS Adams departed from New York bound for the Pacific.
20 Dec 1944 USS Adams transits the Panama Canal.
29 Dec 1944 USS Adams arrived at San Diego.
1 Jan 1945 USS Adams departed from San Diego bound for Pearl Harbor.
7 Jan 1945 USS Adams arrived at Pearl Harbor.
2 Mar 1945 USS Adams departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Ulithi.
14 Mar 1945 USS Adams arrived at Ulithi.
19 Mar 1945 USS Adams departed from Ulithi to participate in the operations of Okinawa.

1 Apr 1945 While operating of Okinawa USS Adams is damaged when she is near missed by a Japanese kamikaze aircraft in position 26°12'N, 127°08'E. Adams was towed to Kerama Retto for temporary repairs.
7 Apr 1945 USS Adams departed from Kerama Retto bound for the Mare Island Navy Yard for full repairs and overhaul.
7 May 1945 USS Adams arrived at the Mare Island Navy Yard.
6 Jul 1945 USS Adams departed from the Mare Island Navy Yard.
10 Jul 1945 USS Adams arrived at San Diego.
17 Jul 1945 USS Adams departed from San Diego bound for Pearl Harbor.
23 Jul 1945 USS Adams arrived at Pearl Harbor.
4 Aug 1945 USS Adams depart from Pearl Harbor bound for Eniwetok.
11 Aug 1945 USS Adams arrived at Eniwetok.
12 Aug 1945 USS Adams departed from Eniwetok bound for Guam.
15 Aug 1945 USS Adams arrived at Guam.
16 Aug 1945 USS Adams departed from Guam bound for Buckner Bay, Okinawa.
18 Aug 1945 USS Adams arrived at Buckner Bay, Okinawa.
